title: Mosaic Company Or Zoetis Inc.: Which Is A Buy In The Array Of Agribstocks
text: The Mosaic Company, through its subsidiaries, produces and markets concentrated phosphate and potash crop nutrients in North America and internationally. It owns and operates mines, which produce concentrated phosphate crop. Institutions hold 90% of shares, insiders less than 0.1%, and may ignore dividends yielding 1% yearly.
